articles.author: Louis Oelofse, Kieran Burke
articles.title: Ukraine, 9 nations form ballistic missile defense coalition - dw.com
articles.description: Ukraine and nine European countries launched a coalition to protect Europe from ballistic missiles, drawing on Kyiv’s wartime experience. Follow DW for more.
